title: Gears & Kingdoms
description: Gears & Kingdoms is a modpack that combines medieval fantasy with automation through the Create mod
body:
**Gears & Kingdoms** is a diverse modpack that expands the world of Minecraft with creative mechanics from the **Create** mod while also adding an interesting fantasy component. Players who enjoy both exploring the world and building advanced machines will find an ideal blend of both worlds here. It challenges players' creativity and offers a wealth of new possibilities for resource usage and world design.

<details>
<summary>Versioning</summary>

Gears & Kingdoms x.y.z
- x = Huge Update or plus one when y is more then 9
- y = small changes
- z = only modupdates and/or little changes

</details>
